Publications

Research, written
from Africa.

Peer-reviewed papers, technical reports, and dataset releases from TRI AI's research initiatives.

  • February 13, 2026 research Proceedings of the African NLP Workshop

    Towards Speech Recognition for Under-Resourced African Languages: A Sauti Project Benchmark

    Tejumade Afonja, Lawrence Francis, George Igwegbe

  • November 7, 2025 research arXiv preprint

    ChowNet: A Diverse Image Dataset for African Cuisine Recognition

    Oluwafemi Azeez, Kenechi Dukor, Tejumade Afonja
